parents.subject: LU-14291 obdclass: unwind server code out of llog

commit.subject: LU-13139 obdclass: make several dt functions exportable
commit.message:
LU-13139 obdclass: make several dt functions exportable

Several dt functions are currently simple inline macros. Soon
these functions will expand there scope and with inline can lead
to module export issues. To resolve this change several of the
dt functions into obdclass functions that are exportable.

Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Change-Id: I96784de41b3c0f8bda36eb212b8b331185aff61b
